Game.Name: Nightmare Busters (Europe) (Proto)
Game.plot: Nightmare Busters is a platformer that fell to the wastelands of unreleased snes games. Gameplay wise, it is similar in style to Super Mario Bros. Unlike many games that were abandoned, this game was eventually released in 2004 for cell phones as Flynn's Adventure. A prototype was found by DuoFan. The game was being created by Nichibutsu, who is more famous for their board and racing games for SFC than plaformers. The developer was apparently a company called Arcade Zone, who developed the game Legend. The game was shown at Shinshokai 1994, and made it into Nintendo Power's 1995 preview issue. CODES:No Harm7E108701 Infinite Lives7E1F9D09Infinite Dash (you can dash an unlimited number of times)7E1FC909Infinite Tornadoes7E1DE109Infinite Spinners7E1FDD09Infinite Bomb Blast7E1FD909 Reviewer: Evan Ghttp://www.snescentral.com/article.php?id=0827
Game.Notes: Synchronized with the wavelengh of dreams, the miserable Tyrant has discovered a way to enter them and convolute what children see, hear and feel while they sleep - all for the benefit of his twisted amusement. Enter Flynn and his twin brother Floyd, two virtuous leprechauns who refuse to sit idly by while the Tyrant weaves his dreadful delusions. Get going, gents! There's no time to lose!
